    B

    back() - Method in class tailFinder.view.game.debug.GameCommandPane
    Closes the command panel and returns to the main menu.
    backBotton - Static variable in class tailFinder.view.game.WinLossAlertPane
     
    BackBotton - Class in tailFinder.view.menu.button
    Back to Main Menu button for returning from game or dialogs.
    BackBotton() - Constructor for class tailFinder.view.menu.button.BackBotton
    Constructs BackBotton with "Back to Main Menu" label.
    BaseBlockPane - Class in tailFinder.model.block.base
    Base class for all block types in the game.
    BaseBlockPane() - Constructor for class tailFinder.model.block.base.BaseBlockPane
    Constructs a BaseBlockPane with default size of 100x100 pixels.
    BaseMenuButton - Class in tailFinder.view.menu.button
    Base class for all menu buttons in the game.
    BaseMenuButton() - Constructor for class tailFinder.view.menu.button.BaseMenuButton
    Initializes a menu button with default styling and event handlers.
    bedrock() - Method in class tailFinder.model.contract.PassableTest.SolidBlocks
     
    bedrock() - Method in class tailFinder.model.map.BlockMapLogicTest.TransferByte
     
    BedRockPane - Class in tailFinder.model.block.solid
    Represents a Bedrock block in the game world.
    BedRockPane() - Constructor for class tailFinder.model.block.solid.BedRockPane
    Constructs BedRockPane with gray background and bedrock texture.
    block - Variable in class tailFinder.view.game.VisibleGridBlockTest
     
    BlockMapLogic - Class in tailFinder.model.map
    Manages the game world map and block data.
    BlockMapLogic(int) - Constructor for class tailFinder.model.map.BlockMapLogic
    Initializes the BlockMapLogic with a specific difficulty level.
